title: Requirements for Claim Status Management Feature
response:
Feedback Summary (3 comments):

General Comments:
1. There is no admin role. Only individual employee can perform all these actions.

Specific Text Comments:
1. "**Authorization**: Only authenticated users with a...": Only the employee user himself can perform status management operations
2. "**Audit Trail**: All status changes must be logged...": Audit only required at log level, should not be stored into DB

comments.comment: There is no admin role. Only individual employee can perform all these actions.
Only the employee user himself can perform status management operations
comments.selectedText: **Authorization**: Only authenticated users with appropriate permissions can perform status management operations

comments.comment: Audit only required at log level, should not be stored into DB
comments.selectedText: **Audit Trail**: All status changes must be logged with user identification and timestamp information
